decks.notes: The focus of this deck is to utilize control elements in order to dominate the battlefield and prevent the opponent from carrying out their game plan effectively. By playing a combination of white and blue spells, the deck aims to disrupt opponent's strategies and establish dominance through superior board control. Ascended Lawmage serves as the commander, providing additional synergy with the control theme of the deck. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to control the game and outmaneuver opponents through strategic plays and resource management.
